rationale: The only resume change was relocating every employer to India, which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same substantive concerns: minimal C++ on Windows (~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle, and no fixed income/capital markets domain. The wording differs and the experience estimate shifts slightly (~15+ vs ~13+ years), but that variance is within ordinary run-to-run noise and is not tied to the location signal. No concern, penalty, or reasoning in the variant keys off the candidate being located in India.
